query:
SELECT clientId, taskName, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM clientTasks 
GROUP BY clientId, taskName 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY clientId, taskName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute SELECT clientId, taskName, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM clientTasks 
GROUP BY clientId, taskName 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 
ORDER BY clientId, taskName;
